title: Staining Protocol for Unicellular Protists: Mitotracker and DAPI
author: Unknown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.gg5bty6

steps.title: 2% PFA Fixation
steps.instruction: 2% PFA Fixation: Add PFA drop by drop and mixing carefully into 1mL cells for a final concentration of 2%PFA

steps.title: Incubate cells for 4 min at room temperature 00:04:00
steps.instruction: Incubate cells for 4 min at room temperature 00:04:00

steps.title: Add 1mM mitotracker dye
steps.instruction: Add 1mM mitotracker dye. Room temperature, protect from light

steps.title: Incubate for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate for 10 minutes. Room temperature, protect from light 00:10:00

steps.title: Add 1/1000 DAPI dye
steps.instruction: Add 1/1000 DAPI dye. Room temperature, protect from light

steps.title: Incubate for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate for 5 minutes. Room temperature, protect from light 00:05:00 Total incubation times: Mytotracker: 15min DAPI: 5min

steps.title: Centrifuge at 1000g for 5 minutes...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 1000g for 5 minutes and resuspend with 1xPBS 00:05:00

steps.title: Mount your slide and ready for observation
steps.instruction: Mount your slide and ready for observation!
